Designs

No results match your filters. Try adjusting your selections or clearing some filters.

Publish Your Own Design

×

Publish Your Own Design

Meshery offers two primary ways to bring designs into your system: Create and Import.

Create:
  • To create a design pattern using Meshery UI: Open Meshery UI, go to Configuration > Designs, click Create Design, select category and model then configure your application
    Learn more about creating designs using Meshery UI
  • To create design pattern using Meshery CLI: Run `mesheryctl design` to start an interactive prompt that guides you through creating a design pattern from scratch.
    Learn more about creating designs using Meshery CLI
Import:
Ideal when you already have a design (e.g., Docker Compose, Helm Charts, Kubernetes Manifests) and want to bring it into Meshery. Use the "Import" option in the Designs panel to upload a file or provide a URL. Learn more about importing designs
Publish your design to catalog:
  • Navigate to the Designs panel in Meshery UI.
  • Select your design and click the info button ("i") to add details: type, technologies, description, caveats.
  • Click "Publish" from the actions menu.
  • Submit the design for review by Meshery Cloud admins.
  • Once approved, your design will be published to the Meshery Catalog.
